checks.label: articles.json contains at least one paper
QA fail verdicts are not published
current run produced at least one new deep analysis
published papers have no QA warnings

agentFlow.responsibility: 发现候选内容，保留来源、主题、时间和热度信号，避免只靠标题判断。
agentFlow.signal: 1 paper candidate(s) from the papers kernel

agentFlow.responsibility: 收集 README、abstract、sourceUrl、paperUrl、benchmark、版本号等证据，让分析有依据。
按岗位相关性、架构价值、实践价值、评估质量、可迁移性和新鲜度排序。
agentFlow.signal: 1 current analysis item(s) available after QA and reviewer filtering

agentFlow.responsibility: 用教授视角解释该学什么、好在哪里、弱在哪里、如何迁移到自己的工作。
agentFlow.signal: 4 recent deep article(s), 16 total archived deep item(s)

agentFlow.responsibility: 运行结构校验、编码校验和质量门槛，失败时不静默发布。
把通过质量门槛的小批量内容写入前端可读 JSON，保持每日 feed 决策清晰。
把未入选但有复用价值的内容和历史运行记录保存下来，后续用于架构思路和选题复盘。
agentFlow.signal: public/data/articles-archive.json, data/agent-memory, and SQLite runs table

mustRead.title: Agent Harness Engineering: A Survey
mustRead.reason: AI Agents, Agent Harness / Observability; total 77; strongest signals: role_relevance, architecture_value, novelty. AHE signals: harness engineering, agent harness. FDE signals: observability/debugging.

professorLesson: 离线模式下只根据已收集证据保留《Agent Harness Engineering: A Survey》的基础脉络。
goodIdeaToSteal: ## Metadata Title: Agent Harness Engineering: A Survey Authors: 双盲匿名 (TMLR under review) Venue: TMLR · 在审 Source: OpenReview Source URL: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=3hXEPbG0dh PDF URL: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=3hXEPbG0dh Source signals: OpenReview, TMLR · 在审, offline fixture Focus topics: AI Agents, Agent Harness / Observability ## Paper section list…
badIdeaOrRisk: 当前分析受限于已收集 evidence.content，未使用证据外信息。
transferablePattern: 离线模式：本轮只抓到论文文本摘要，未做联网核验，暂不展开批判性分析；以上原文部分仅供先行阅读。
futureWorkApplication: 论文证据未提供限制或未来工作段落。
architectureTakeaway: ## Metadata Title: Agent Harness Engineering: A Survey Authors: 双盲匿名 (TMLR under review) Venue: TMLR · 在审 Source: OpenReview Source URL: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=3hXEPbG0dh PDF URL: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=3hXEPbG0dh Source signals: OpenReview, TMLR · 在审, offline fixture Focus topics: AI Agents, Agent Harness / Observability ## Paper section list…
